collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (6 total Queries, 6 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `jadwal`.*, `turnamen`.`nama_turnamen`, `game`.`nama_game` as `game`, `tim1`.`nama_tim` as `nama_tim_1`, `tim2`.`nama_tim` as `nama_tim_2` FROM `jadwal` JOIN `turnamen` ON `turnamen`.`id_turnamen` = `jadwal`.`id_turnamen` LEFT JOIN `game` ON `game`.`id_game` = `turnamen`.`id_game` JOIN `tim` as `tim1` ON `tim1`.`id_tim` = `jadwal`.`id_tim_1` JOIN `tim` as `tim2` ON `tim2`.`id_tim` = `jadwal`.`id_tim_2` WHERE `jadwal_tanding` LIKE '%2026-05-20%' ESCAPE '!'

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `jadwal`.*, `turnamen`.`nama_turnamen`, `game`.`nama_game` as `game`, `tim1`.`nama_tim` as `nama_tim_1`, `tim2`.`nama_tim` as `nama_tim_2` FROM `jadwal` JOIN `turnamen` ON `turnamen`.`id_turnamen` = `jadwal`.`id_turnamen` LEFT JOIN `game` ON `game`.`id_game` = `turnamen`.`id_game` JOIN `tim` as `tim1` ON `tim1`.`id_tim` = `jadwal`.`id_tim_1` JOIN `tim` as `tim2` ON `tim2`.`id_tim` = `jadwal`.`id_tim_2` WHERE `jadwal_tanding` LIKE '%2026-05-20%' ESCAPE '!'
